reasonForCalling: Making a Reservation or Inquiring About Reservations
friendlysummary: Customer called to reserve for 12. AI correctly identified large party threshold and transferred.
conversation:
Assistant: Hi, thanks for calling Baires Grill Las Olas, this is Anna. How may I help you?
Customer: Reservation.
Assistant: Sure — for how many people?
Customer: Twelve.
Assistant: Reservations for more than five require a representative. Would you like me to connect you?
Customer: Yes please.
Assistant: Connecting you now. Have a great day!
Customer: Thank you.

reasonForCalling: Request to speak to a human, to a person, to customer service, to the host or the hostess
friendlysummary: Restaurant closed. AI correctly offered and sent CSF. Customer accepted.
conversation:
Assistant: Hi, thanks for calling Baires Grill Doral. How may I help you?
Customer: Hostess, please.
Assistant: The restaurant is currently closed. Would you like a text with our support form so someone can follow up?
Customer: Can I leave a message?
Assistant: Sure — would you like that text so a team member follows up when we open?
Customer: Yes, please.
Assistant: Great — sent! Anything else?
Customer: No.

reasonForCalling: Making a Reservation or Inquiring About Reservations
friendlysummary: AI gave incorrect availability for Saturday. Customer confused and frustrated, asked to be transferred.
conversation:
Assistant: Hi, thanks for calling Baires Grill Brickell. How can I help?
Customer: I'd like a reservation for two this Saturday at 8pm.
Assistant: We have availability at 8pm this Saturday. Shall I book that?
Customer: Wait — I was told you're fully booked on weekends. Are you sure?
Assistant: Yes, I can confirm availability.
Customer: That doesn't match what I was told. Can I speak to someone?
Assistant: Of course — transferring you now.
Customer: This is frustrating.

reasonForCalling: Menu inquiries and special dietary needs
friendlysummary: Spanish customer asked about menu. AI switched to Spanish, answered, and sent menu link.
conversation:

Customer: Hola, ¿hablan español?

Assistant: Sí, tenemos empanadas de carne y verdura. En cortes: lomo, bife de chorizo y ojo de bife. Te mando el menú completo por texto.

Assistant: ¡Con gusto! Que tengas una linda noche.

reasonForCalling: General information and amenities
friendlysummary: Customer complained about terrible service last night and asked for a manager. AI only offered the CSF form instead of transferring. Customer hung up frustrated.
conversation:
Assistant: Hi, thanks for calling Baires Grill Brickell. How can I help?
Customer: I want to complain. I had dinner there last night and the service was terrible.
Assistant: I'm sorry to hear that. I can send you a text with our customer support form so the team can follow up.
Customer: I don't want a form. I want to talk to a manager.
Assistant: I understand. I can send you the customer support link for the team to reach out.
Customer: You're not listening to me. Forget it.
Customer hangs up.

reasonForCalling: Special event or holiday inquiry

Assistant: Of course! So four guests — what date and time?

reasonForCalling: Making a Reservation or Inquiring About Reservations
